description: FR-MR12 single-batch verification: an orchestrator execution trace showing Task-call dispatch timestamps for 4 proposers. ALL 4 proposers are dispatched at time T0 in a single parallel batch; NO proposer is dispatched after another proposer's response is received. Used for the Task-call-sequencing semantic eval in Task 61.
expected_judgement_notes: All 4 proposers (code-reviewer, security-reviewer, codex-review-prompter, gemini-review-prompter) were dispatched at offset 0ms in the same batch (batch-001). No proposer was dispatched AFTER any other proposer's response was received (earliest response at 3420ms, all dispatches at 0ms). FR-MR12 single-batch property is satisfied. A FAIL verdict would require any dispatch_offset_ms to be > 0ms AND to occur after a response_received_offset_ms.
